response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering breadth and 16+ years of experience across multiple domains, this role requires specialized expertise in embedded network security, firmware development, and critically, native-level Japanese proficiency—none of which are evident in the resume. His recent career has focused on web/backend engineering (TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than C-based embedded systems, LAN-switch products, or network security features. The missing Japanese language requirement is a hard blocker for this position.
strengths: Extensive 16+ year software engineering career demonstrating adaptability across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Proven ability to learn new domains and take ownership of complex projects from architecture to deployment
Strong DevOps and infrastructure experience with CI/CD, version control, and system administration
concerns: No evidence of native-level Japanese language proficiency, which is a required qualification for the role
Recent career trajectory is web/backend-focused (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS); C programming experience is dated (2014-2015) and not recent
No demonstrated experience in embedded network security, firmware development, LAN-switch products, or relevant security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.)

key_factors.factor: Lack of recent C and embedded systems experience
No network security or embedded networking product background
